Name: Percentage of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation following SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of times First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation is immediately preceded by First Look-Your updates are overdue
Metric: Number of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue' occurs

Name: Percentage of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation activities that occur after a revision cycle (i.e., after RW-EIC Accept or RW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'RW-EIC Accept'

Name: Frequency of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in relation to Manuscript Export Succeeded within the same case
Metric: Number of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation appears only once versus multiple times
Metric: the average of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Ratio of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of variants ending with First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation followed by Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Number of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation events that are part of long-running cases (performance > 1,000,000 seconds)
Metric: Number of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities

Name: Percentage of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences that follow a First Look-Please submit updates activity
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'First Look-Please submit updates'

Name: Frequency of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in accepted manuscripts (i.e., cases ending with Manuscript Export Succeeded after RW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Number of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' occurs

Name: Number of variants in which First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation appears more than once
Metric: the sum of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation events that are directly followed by Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Percentage of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation that occurs without any prior revision-related activities (e.g., no RW–Major Revision due in... activities)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity != 'RW–Major Revision due in 3 days'"}"
